tokenisors.title: Tokenisor in Shona spaCy
sources: H. Masoka, ‘Shona spaCy: A Morphological Analyzer for an Under-Resourced Bantu Language’, Nov. 12, 2025, arXiv: arXiv:2511.16680. doi: 10.48550/arXiv.2511.16680.
tokenisors.description: Tokenisation is integrated within a morphology-aware processing pipeline rather than implemented as a standalone tokenizer. Token boundaries are guided by Shona noun class markers rather than whitespace alone.

morphology_analysers.title: Riddings & Mavhu (2002) Conceptual Framework
sources: D. Ridings and W. Mavhu, ‘Problems and Challenges Encountered when Developing a Morphological Parser for the Shona Language’, African Languages Research Institute, Grahamstown, South Africa, Jul. 2002.
morphology_analysers.description: Proposed development of grammatical parsers, syntactic analysers and spell checkers as foundations for a Shona morphological analyser. No implementation was reported.

morphology_analysers.title: Mashoko
sources: F. Kambarami, ‘ut Of Vocabulary Words in Spell- checking for Southern Bantu Languages: a morphological analysis-based approach for Shona’, Chninhoyi University of Technology, Chinhoyi, 2021.
morphology_analysers.description: Rule-based Shona morphological analyser designed to process out-of-vocabulary words using lexical lookup and morphological decomposition.
morphology_analysers.model_or_algorithm: finite state automata (FSA) and finite state transducers (FST)

morphology_analysers.title: Shona spaCy
sources: H. Masoka, 'Shona spaCy: A Morphological Analyzer for an Under-Resourced Bantu Language', Nov. 12, 2025, arXiv: arXiv:2511.16680. doi: 10.48550/arXiv.2511.16680.
morphology_analysers.description: Publicly available rule-based morphological analyser implemented within spaCy. Performs tokenisation, lexicon lookup, morphological analysis, feature encoding and structured annotation.

pos_taggers.title: MasakhaPOS
sources: C. M. B. Dione et al., ‘MasakhaPOS: Part-of-Speech Tagging for Typologically Diverse African languages’, in Proceedings of the 61st Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (Volume 1: Long Papers), Toronto, Canada: Association for Computational Linguistics, 2023, pp. 10883–10900. doi: 10.18653/v1/2023.acl-long.609.
pos_taggers.description: Multilingual African POS tagging framework that includes Shona through cross-lingual transfer.

pos_taggers.title: POS Tagging Pipeline in Spacy
sources: H. Masoka, 'Shona spaCy: A Morphological Analyzer for an Under-Resourced Bantu Language', Nov. 12, 2025, arXiv: arXiv:2511.16680. doi: 10.48550/arXiv.2511.16680.
pos_taggers.description: Morphological pipeline integrating lemma generation, POS tagging and morphological feature extraction for Shona.

lexical_resources.title: Duramazwi Guru reChiShona
lexical_resources.description: Comprehensive Shona dictionary widely cited in literature but not publicly available in digital form.
sources: F. Kambarami, 'Out Of Vocabulary Words in Spell- checking for Southern Bantu Languages: a morphological analysis-based approach for Shona', Chninhoyi University of Technology, Chinhoyi, 2021.

raw_corpora.title: Leipzig Corpora Collection (Shona)
raw_corpora.description: Web-based Shona corpus compiled from online sources.
sources: F. Kambarami, 'Out Of Vocabulary Words in Spell- checking for Southern Bantu Languages: a morphological analysis-based approach for Shona', Chninhoyi University of Technology, Chinhoyi, 2021.

raw_corpora.title: ALLEX Project Shona Corpus
sources: F. Kambarami, 'Out Of Vocabulary Words in Spell- checking for Southern Bantu Languages: a morphological analysis-based approach for Shona', Chninhoyi University of Technology, Chinhoyi, 2021.

annotated_corpora.title: Masoka (2025)
annotated_corpora.description: Annotated for intent, sentiment, dialogue acts, tone and code-mixing.
sources: H. Masoka, 'Advancing Conversational AI with Shona Slang: A Dataset and Hybrid Model for Digital Inclusion', 2025, arXiv. doi: 10.48550/ARXIV.2509.14249.

annotated_corpora.title: ShonaSenti Dataset
annotated_corpora.description: Annotated Shona Twitter sentiment corpus with three-class and five-class sentiment labels.
sources: B. Makuwe, K. R. Mabokela, and T. Schlippe, ‘Sentiment Analysis for Shona’, in 2023 11th International Conference on Affective Computing and Intelligent Interaction (ACII), Cambridge, MA, USA: IEEE, Sep. 2023, pp. 1–8. doi: 10.1109/ACII59096.2023.10388095.

domain_specific_corpora.title: Code-170k-Shona
domain_specific_corpora.description: Programming-related conversations translated into Shona for coding education.
sources: Mich-Seth Owusu, ‘Code-170k-shona: Programming Conversations in Shona}’. Hugging Face, 2025. [Online]. Available: https://huggingface.co/datasets/michsethowusu/Code-170k-shona. [Accessed: 12-Jun-2025].

parallel_corpora.title: English–Shona Bible Corpus (OPUS)
parallel_corpora.description: Parallel Bible corpus for machine translation.

other_text_systems.title: ShonaSenti
other_text_systems.description: Annotated Shona Twitter sentiment corpus with three-class and five-class sentiment labels.
sources: B. Makuwe, K. R. Mabokela, and T. Schlippe, ‘Sentiment Analysis for Shona’, in 2023 11th International Conference on Affective Computing and Intelligent Interaction (ACII), Cambridge, MA, USA: IEEE, Sep. 2023, pp. 1–8. doi: 10.1109/ACII59096.2023.10388095.
